summary: Test suite covers main requirements (manifest parsing, license classification, report generation, workflow integration) with 44 tests across two files. Strengths: tests all exit codes, both manifest formats, license statuses, and workflow structure via act. Weaknesses: assertions are loose (text presence checks rather than exact formats), edge cases sparse (no malformed JSON, empty manifests, version normalization validation, comment/whitespace handling in requirements.txt), monolithic act integration test mixes many assertions, and fixtures (referenced but not provided) create blind spots. Would catch major regressions (script breakage, exit codes, output structure) but miss subtle changes, malformed input handling, and boundary conditions.
